tasks.label: JellyDL: Docker Build
tasks.command: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; if [ -z "$IMAGE_REPO" ]; then echo "IMAGE_REPO is not set (expected in .env)."; exit 1; fi; if [ -z "${input:imageVersion}" ]; then echo "imageVersion input is required."; exit 1; fi; IMAGE_TAG="${input:imageVersion}"; APP_VERSION="${IMAGE_TAG#v}"; npm version --no-git-tag-version "$APP_VERSION" >/dev/null; docker build --build-arg VERSION="$APP_VERSION" -t "$IMAGE_REPO:$IMAGE_TAG" -t "$IMAGE_REPO:latest" .'

tasks.label: JellyDL: GHCR Login
tasks.command: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; if [ -z "$GHCR_TOKEN" ]; then echo "GHCR_TOKEN is not set (expected in .env)."; exit 1; fi; if [ -z "$GHCR_USERNAME" ]; then echo "GHCR_USERNAME is not set (expected in .env)."; exit 1; fi; echo "$GHCR_TOKEN" | docker login ghcr.io -u "$GHCR_USERNAME" --password-stdin'

tasks.label: JellyDL: Docker Push
tasks.command: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; if [ -z "$IMAGE_REPO" ]; then echo "IMAGE_REPO is not set (expected in .env)."; exit 1; fi; docker push "$IMAGE_REPO:${input:imageVersion}" && docker push "$IMAGE_REPO:latest"'
